ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/Microsoft-Defender-for-Cloud
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/Microsoft-Defender-for-Cloud
Language: powershell
Welcome to the Microsoft Defender for Cloud community repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Micke-K/IntuneManagement
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Micke-K/IntuneManagement
Language: powershell
Copy, export, import, delete, document and compare policies and profiles in Intune and Azure with PowerShell script and WPF UI. Import ADMX files and registry settings with ADMX ingestion. View and edit PowerShell script.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MicrosoftDocs/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MicrosoftDocs/mcp
Language: powershell
Official Microsoft Learn MCP Server – powering LLMs and AI agents with real-time, trusted Microsoft docs & code samples.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Raphire/Win11Debloat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat
Language: powershell
A simple, lightweight PowerShell script to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to customize, declutter and improve your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ScoopInstaller/Extras
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ScoopInstaller/Extras
Language: powershell
📦 The Extras bucket for Scoop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ScoopInstaller/Scoop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ScoopInstaller/Scoop
Language: powershell
A command-line installer for Windows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SkipToTheEndpoint/OpenIntuneBaseline
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SkipToTheEndpoint/OpenIntuneBaseline
Language: powershell
Community-driven baseline to accelerate Intune adoption and learning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SpecterOps/BloodHound-Legacy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SpecterOps/BloodHound-Legacy
Language: powershell
Six Degrees of Domain Admin

ns0:entry.ns0:title: actions/runner-images
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/runner-images
Language: powershell
GitHub Actions runner images

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cisagov/ScubaGear
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cisagov/ScubaGear
Language: powershell
Automation to assess the state of your M365 tenant against CISA's baselines

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dataplat/dbatools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dataplat/dbatools
Language: powershell
🚀 SQL Server automation and instance migrations have never been safer, faster or freer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hak5/usbrubberducky-payloads
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hak5/usbrubberducky-payloads
Language: powershell
The Official USB Rubber Ducky Payload Repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jamesstringer90/Easy-GPU-PV
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jamesstringer90/Easy-GPU-PV
Language: powershell
A Project dedicated to making GPU Partitioning on Windows easier!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jenkinsci/docker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jenkinsci/docker
Language: powershell
Docker official jenkins repo

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mandiant/flare-vm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mandiant/flare-vm
Language: powershell
A collection of software installations scripts for Windows systems that allows you to easily setup and maintain a reverse engineering environment on a VM.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/ARI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/ARI
Language: powershell
Azure Resource Inventory - It's a Powerful tool to create EXCEL inventory from Azure Resources with low effort

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/Agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/Agents
Language: powershell
The Microsoft 365 Agent SDK simplifies building full stack, multichannel, trusted agents for platforms including M365, Teams, Copilot Studio, and Webchat.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/Microsoft365DSC
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/Microsoft365DSC
Language: powershell
Manages, configures, extracts and monitors Microsoft 365 tenant configurations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/fabric-toolbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/fabric-toolbox
Language: powershell
Fabric toolbox is a repository of tools, accelerators, scripts, and samples to accelerate your success with Microsoft Fabric, brought to you by Fabric CAT.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/hve-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/hve-core
Language: powershell
A refined collection of Hypervelocity Engineering components (instructions, prompts, agents) to start your project off right, or upgrade your existing projects to get the most out of all Copilots

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/winget-pkgs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/winget-pkgs
Language: powershell
The Microsoft community Windows Package Manager manifest repository
